violations.text: Raw animal foods (such as eggs, pork and chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as chopped garlic, French fries and cooked pork) in the cold-hold unit and 2 dr reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Foods rearranged during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of grey residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
Inspector observed a knife being stored in between equipment. PIC informed to sanitize utensil and properly store it. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2026
The basement has an accumulation of rodent droppings, clutter and soil debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
The (basement) walls and foundation are in poor repair. Inspector observed several openings. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026

Raw animal foods (such as raw chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as crab rangoons) in the 2 door refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

The doors to the outside, located by the basement and kitchen back doors, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: 1. Walls in the kitchen 2. Floors underneath shelving and equipment in basement (dried rodent droppings) 3. Kitchen hood vents 4. Ceiling in basement The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The following was observed in poor repair: 1. Several ceiling tiles in the kitchen 2. Several ceiling tiles by the restrooms The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
